description: Root entry point  -  GenericAll over hop1 computers
AS-REP Roasting target  -  DontRequirePreauth set by hop2_user1 GenericWrite
Kerberoasting target  -  SPN written by hop2_user1 GenericWrite
Unconstrained Delegation  -  TrustedForDelegation set by hop2_user1 GenericWrite
No Password + EncType=0 (DES fallback)  -  weak encryption
No Password + EncType=4 (RC4 only)  -  medium encryption
Shadow Credentials target  -  hop2_user2 has Write-msDS-KeyCredentialLink
Inside hop3_ou1  -  has GenericAll over SYSVOL (SYSVOL ACL abuse)
ACE hub  -  holds every ACE right type over individual target objects
ACE target 2  -  All Extended Rights holder
ACE target 6  -  No Password (empty password allowed)
ACE target 10  -  UnixHomeDirectory and LoginShell attributes set
ACE target 12  -  Absolute Admin (member of Domain Admins)
